upload.title: Upload Model Files
upload.description: Run this command to upload local files to this model.

download.title: Download Model
download.description: Run this command to download this model.

use.title: Use This Model
use.description: Run this command to serve this model with vLLM.

delete.title: Delete Model
delete.warning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the {{name}} model repository and all of its files, including weights.

set.label: Mark as featured model
set.confirmation: Are you sure you want to mark model {{name}} as a featured model?
set.error: Failed to mark model as featured

unset.label: Remove from featured models
unset.confirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from featured models?
unset.success: Model removed from featured models successfully
unset.error: Failed to remove model from featured models

create.modelNameHelper: Supports letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, and dot. Must start with a letter or number.
create.uploadTip: After creating the model, you can upload files using the command line.
